name: calendar
description: Unified calendar management: list, create, and delete calendar events

operation.description: Operation to perform: list, create, delete

start.description: Start datetime in ISO format (used for create, list)

end.description: End datetime in ISO format (used for create)

date_range.description: Number of days to look ahead when listing (default 7)

calendar_name.description: Name of the calendar to use
